corrections.note: Image clearly prints ἀποστρεβλοῦσθαι ('to be wrenched/twisted off'); transcription has the non-word ἀποσφυδᾶν.
Abbreviation of σώματος is σωμ., not συμ.

uncertain.note: Image ending looks like φορίῳ (neuter dative of φορεῖον) rather than φορίᾳ; iota subscript makes ᾳ/ῳ hard to distinguish.

uncertain.location: apparatus v.8 'τα των op. μεζονα V'
uncertain.note: 'op.' likely should be 'ορ.' (abbrev. of ὀρέων); and 'μεζονα' may be 'μειζονα' — cannot fully confirm from image resolution.
Lemma/variant may be reversed (body reads ἐκρίψαι, so lemma should be εκριψαι; V-reading appears to be εκτριψειν).
